description: Starting point. Paul and Barnabas are sent out by the church for missionary work.
Port city where Paul and Barnabas embark on their journey.
First stop on Cyprus. First missionary journey begins.
Elymas the sorcerer opposes them; Paul blinds him. Governor Sergius Paulus believes.
John Mark departs here, returning to Jerusalem. Paul and Barnabas continue.
Paul preaches in synagogue. Some believe, but Jews stir up opposition.
Paul and Barnabas preach the gospel. Many believe, but opposition rises.
Paul heals a crippled beggar. People mistake them for gods. Paul is stoned and left for dead.
Paul preaches the gospel. Many become disciples of Jesus.
Paul and Barnabas retrace their steps, strengthening the churches they planted.
Paul and Barnabas return home, reporting to the church all God has done.
